title: allophyllum tenerrimum
intro: Allophyllum tenerrimum, also known as purple sage, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Allophyllum tenerrimum are said to include reducing fever, calming the nervous system, and promoting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Allophyllum tenerrimum can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and grinding the leaves to create a powder that can be used in capsule form or added to food.
